data.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Files read. SKILL.md has EnterPlanMode flowchart at lines 22-50 that includes brainstorm enforcement. HOOK-INJECTION.md is a condensed version. Neither contains Feature Intent Detection section. 11/13 tests fail RED (2 pass: test_feature_intent_section_routes_to_brainstorm and test_hook_injection_routes_to_brainstorm because 'brainstorm' already exists). Ready to implement.
